p.em: Target Architecture: x86_64 | Page Size: 4096B | Cache Line: 64B

ul.li: CPU Utilization: Sub-optimal. N-1 cores idle during FS I/O.

ol.li: Strict Ordering: Always acquire L1 -> L2 -> L3 -> L4.
Sibling Ordering: Inode locks must follow ascending_id rule.

ul.li: Coarse Lock: High "Cache Line Bouncing" on global_lock under high load.
Fine Lock: Eliminates "False Sharing" via explicit padding to 64B boundary.
Bus Traffic: Reduced via Inode Hash Partitioning (Bucket-based locks).
Memory Overheard: Increased (~128B per Inode structure).

g.title: Invariant: Must be held for mount/unmount
Invariant: Must be held for mount/unmount
